title: danthonia domingensis subsp. shrevei
intro: Danthonia domingensis subsp. shrevei, also known as Shreve's danthonia, is a perennial grass species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Shreve's danthonia may include teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
